#+title: Pets ontology, a minimal ELOT example
#+subtitle: An OWL ontology
#+author: John Doe
#+date: WIP

This file is for testing SPARQL query execution with ELOT.

* my-ont
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont
:ELOT-context-type: ontology
:ELOT-context-localname: my-ont
:ELOT-default-prefix: ex
:header-args:omn: :tangle ./my-ont.omn :noweb yes
:header-args:emacs-lisp: :tangle no :exports results
:header-args: :padline yes
:END:

** Queries

*** Block 1: bare SELECT, no PREFIX boilerplate
#+begin_src sparql :url "my-ont.omn" :eval never-export :exports both
  select *
  {
    ?OP a owl:ObjectProperty .
    optional { ?OP rdfs:domain ?domain }
    optional { ?OP rdfs:range ?range }
  } 
#+end_src

#+RESULTS:
| OP        | domain | range  |
|-----------+--------+--------|
| ex:chases | ex:dog | ex:cat |

*** Block 2: SELECT with one inline ~PREFIX~ that agrees with the ~prefix-table~
This will test deduplication.
#+begin_src sparql :url "my-ont.omn" :eval never-export :exports both
  PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>  # already defined

  select *
  {
    ?OP a owl:ObjectProperty .
    optional { ?OP rdfs:domain ?domain }
    optional { ?OP rdfs:range ?range }
  } 
#+end_src

#+RESULTS:
| OP        | domain | range  |
|-----------+--------+--------|
| ex:chases | ex:dog | ex:cat |

*** Block 3: SELECT with one inline ~PREFIX~ that overrides the alist by redeclaration
We declare ~rdfs:~ with a different URI, so the query doesn't return any result for domain/range.

#+begin_src sparql :url "my-ont.omn" :eval never-export :exports both
  PREFIX rdfs: <http://example.com/>    # existing prefix, different uri

  select *
  {
    ?OP a owl:ObjectProperty .
    optional { ?OP rdfs:domain ?domain }
    optional { ?OP rdfs:range ?range }
  } 
#+end_src

#+RESULTS:
| OP        | domain | range |
|-----------+--------+-------|
| ex:chases |        |       |

*** Block 4: SELECT with one inline ~PREFIX~ that introduces a new prefix to replace an existing one
We declare ~foo:~ with an existing URI, and want to see that replacing ~ex:~ in the output.

#+begin_src sparql :url "my-ont.omn" :eval never-export :exports both
  PREFIX foo: <http://example.org/>    # existing prefix, different uri

  select *
  {
    ?OP a owl:ObjectProperty .
    optional { ?OP rdfs:domain ?domain }
    optional { ?OP rdfs:range ?range }
  } 
#+end_src

#+RESULTS:
| OP        | domain | range  |
|-----------+--------+--------|
| ex:chases | ex:dog | ex:cat |


*** Block 5: CONSTRUCT with ~:format ttl~ and ~kill-prefixes~ in ~:post~ hook
#+name: my-construct
#+begin_src sparql :url "my-ont.omn" :eval never-export :format ttl :wrap "src ttl" :cache yes :post kill-prefixes(data=*this*) :eval never-export :exports results
  construct {
    ?class a owl:Class .
    ?subclass rdfs:subClassOf ?class .
    ?OP a owl:ObjectProperty ; rdfs:domain ?domain ; rdfs:range ?range .
  } {
    ?class a owl:Class .
    optional { ?subclass rdfs:subClassOf ?class }
    optional { ?OP rdfs:domain ?domain }
    optional { ?OP rdfs:range ?range }
  } 
#+end_src

#+RESULTS[d2abbf7936d85939c7c4cc4eb9d4a1385a9c4df2]: my-construct
#+begin_src ttl

ex:snake  a              owl:Class ;
        rdfs:subClassOf  ex:animal .

ex:cat  a                owl:Class ;
        rdfs:subClassOf  ex:animal .

ex:dog  a                owl:Class ;
        rdfs:subClassOf  ex:animal .

ex:animal  a    owl:Class .

ex:chases  a         owl:ObjectProperty ;
        rdfs:domain  ex:dog ;
        rdfs:range   ex:cat .
#+end_src

*** Block 6: SELECT with empty result
#+begin_src sparql :url "my-ont.omn" :eval never-export :exports both
  select *
  {
    ?OP a owl:DatatypeProperty .
  } 
#+end_src

#+RESULTS:
: [empty result set]


** Prefixes
:PROPERTIES:
:prefixdefs: yes
:END:
The ontology document in OWL employs the namespace prefixes of table [[prefix-table]].

#+name: prefix-table
#+caption: OWL ontology prefixes
| prefix   | uri                                                                            |
|----------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| owl:     | http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#                                                 |
| rdf:     | http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#                                    |
| xml:     | http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace                                           |
| xsd:     | http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#                                              |
| rdfs:    | http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#                                          |
| skos:    | http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#                                           |
| pav:     | http://purl.org/pav/                                                           |
| foaf:    | http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/                                                     |
| dc:      | http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/                                               |
| dcterms: | http://purl.org/dc/terms/                                                      |
| prov:    | http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#                                                     |
| iof-av:  | https://spec.industrialontologies.org/ontology/core/meta/AnnotationVocabulary/ |
| ex:      | http://exdample.org/                                                           |
| exo:     | http://example.org/ont/                                                        |

** my-ont ontology (exo:my-ont exo:my-ont/0.0)
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       my-ont-ontology-declaration
:custom_id: my-ont-ontology-declaration
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
 # - Import :: https://spec.industrialontologies.org/ontology/core/meta/AnnotationVocabulary/
 - owl:versionInfo :: 0.0 start of my-ont
 - dcterms:title :: "my-ont ontology"@en
 - owl:versionInfo :: 0.0 start of my-ont
 - pav:lastUpdateOn :: {{{modification-time("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ",t)}}}^^xsd:dateTime
 - dcterms:license :: [[https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/]]
 - dcterms:creator :: {{{author}}}
 - dcterms:modified ::  {{{modification-time("%Y-%m-%d",t)}}}^^xsd:date
 - dcterms:publisher :: https://example.org/thepublisher
 - dc:rights :: Copyright info here
 - dcterms:description :: The my-ont ontology is ...
 - rdfs:comment :: The my-ont ontology is ...
** Classes
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       my-ont-class-hierarchy
:custom_id: my-ont-class-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** Animal (ex:animal) [4/4]
 - [X] iof-av:naturalLanguageDefinition :: A living organism
 - [X] iof-av:isPrimitive :: true
 - [X] iof-av:primitiveRationale :: It's so basic
 - [X] skos:example :: mouse, elephant
**** Dog (ex:dog) [2/4]
 - [X] iof-av:naturalLanguageDefinition :: A domesticated carnivorous mammal
 - [X] iof-av:isPrimitive :: true
 - [ ] iof-av:primitiveRationale :: 
 - [ ] skos:example :: 
**** Cat (ex:cat) [1/4]
 - [ ] iof-av:naturalLanguageDefinition :: 
 - [X] iof-av:isPrimitive :: true
 - [ ] iof-av:primitiveRationale :: 
 - [ ] skos:example :: 
**** Snake (ex:snake) [1/4]
 - [ ] iof-av:naturalLanguageDefinition :: 
 - [X] iof-av:isPrimitive :: true
 - [ ] iof-av:primitiveRationale :: 
 - [ ] skos:example :: 

** Object properties
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       my-ont-object-property-hierarchy
:custom_id: my-ont-object-property-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** chases (ex:chases) [1/2]
 - [ ] iof-av:naturalLanguageDefinition :: x chases y iff ...
 - [X] skos:example :: Fido chases Max
 - Domain :: ex:dog
 - Range :: ex:cat
** Data properties
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       my-ont-data-property-hierarchy
:custom_id: my-ont-data-property-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
** Annotation properties
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       my-ont-annotation-property-hierarchy
:custom_id: my-ont-annotation-property-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** owl:versionInfo
*** dcterms:title
 - rdfs:isDefinedBy :: http://purl.org/dc/terms/
*** dcterms:license
 - rdfs:isDefinedBy :: http://purl.org/dc/terms/
*** dcterms:creator
 - rdfs:isDefinedBy :: http://purl.org/dc/terms/
*** dcterms:modified
 - rdfs:isDefinedBy :: http://purl.org/dc/terms/
*** dcterms:publisher
 - rdfs:isDefinedBy :: http://purl.org/dc/terms/
*** dcterms:description
 - rdfs:isDefinedBy :: http://purl.org/dc/terms/
*** dc:rights
 - rdfs:isDefinedBy :: http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/
*** skos:example
 - rdfs:isDefinedBy :: http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core
*** pav:lastUpdateOn
 - rdfs:isDefinedBy :: [[http://purl.org/pav/]]
*** iof-av:isPrimitive
 - rdfs:isDefinedBy :: https://spec.industrialontologies.org/ontology/core/meta/AnnotationVocabulary

*** skos:definition
 - rdfs:isDefinedBy :: http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core
**** iof-av:naturalLanguageDefinition
 - rdfs:isDefinedBy :: https://spec.industrialontologies.org/ontology/core/meta/AnnotationVocabulary/
**** iof-av:primitiveRationale
 - rdfs:isDefinedBy :: https://spec.industrialontologies.org/ontology/core/meta/AnnotationVocabulary/

** Individuals
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       my-ont-individuals
:custom_id: my-ont-individuals
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
